questions.option_b: Feature associated with a different microorganism than Herpes simplex virus oral lesions
questions.option_c: Key feature/clinical implication consistent with Herpes simplex virus oral lesions
questions.option_d: Misleading clinical association not typical for Herpes simplex virus oral lesions
questions.explanation: Correct choice aligns with core Year-2 dentistry knowledge for Herpes simplex virus oral lesions. Distractors reflect common mix-ups in Microbiology.
